title: Oil: Brent eases toward $102 from $111 — sanctions waiver report + strike postponement cause sharp reversal
snippet: Brent crude futures eased toward $102 on Monday after rising above $111 earlier in the session. The sharp reversal was triggered by two factors: (1) Iranian media report that the US proposed a temporary waiver on oil sanctions, and (2) Trump's announcement that he was calling off the planned strike on Iran. The ~$9 intraday swing is one of the largest since the war began. Weekly gain from previous $109 level is now largely erased.
tag_reason: 업데이트 — 유가 추적(src-1157): $109→$111→$102 급반전, 제재유예+공습보류가 이중 하락 촉매
